title: Solopreneur AI Business Toolkit — 150+ Prompts for ChatGPT & Claude
subtitle: Replace your entire team with AI. Marketing, sales, ops, finance & support — all covered.
description:
Stop hiring. Start prompting.

150+ expertly crafted AI prompts that run your entire solo business — marketing, sales, operations, finance, and customer support.

Works with ChatGPT (GPT-4/4o), Claude (Sonnet/Opus), and Gemini Pro.

What's inside:
• 40 Marketing & Content prompts (blog outlines, ad copy, SEO, newsletters)
• 30 Sales & Revenue prompts (outreach sequences, pricing strategy, proposals)
• 25 Operations prompts (SOPs, meeting agendas, project planning)
• 25 Finance & Strategy prompts (forecasting, SWOT, OKRs)
• 20 Customer Support prompts (FAQs, onboarding, retention)
• 10 Hiring & Delegation prompts (job descriptions, freelancer briefs)
• BONUS: AI Workflow Cheat Sheet (printable one-pager)

Format: PDF + Notion page
Updates: Free lifetime updates
